summary: Joel briefly announces his upcoming travel to Web.Start conference in Croatia and a stop in Edinburgh on the way home. He mentions a colleague who created a Google map of Zagreb recommendations. The Edinburgh stop is framed as making amends for a previous gaffe about Scottish-English geography. The post is essentially a short travel notice with no substantive technical content.
key_points: Joel is attending the Web.Start conference in Croatia
FogBugz has international distribution partners, including for German-speaking countries
Joel plans to meet readers in Edinburgh, humorously referencing a past mistake of conflating Scotland with England
money_quotes: I'll briefly stop in Edinburgh to meet some readers and make amends for trying to annex Scotland to England.
I've been reassured by the hotel that I only have to buy the first round, and there'll be a cash bar thereafter.
key_insight: A brief travel announcement showing Joel's international conference circuit and engagement with readers abroad.
